snippet.title: Thalaivi | Official Trailer (Hindi) | Kangana Ranaut | Arvind Swamy | Vijay | 23rd April
snippet.description:

snippet.title: OnePlus 9 Pro 5G Unboxing & First Look - The Perfect Experience #YourBestShot🔥🔥🔥
snippet.description:
Namaskaar Dosto, is video mein maine aapse OnePlus 9 Pro ke baare mein baat ki hai aur share ki hai isi OnePlus 9 Pro Smartphone ki unboxing aur ek first look. OnePlus 9 Pro ek flagship phone hai, jaha is OnePlus 9 Pro mein hai Snapdragon 888 Processor aur yaha 5G bhi available hai aur saath mein hai 8GB/12GB LPDDR5 RAM aur 128GB/256GB UFS3.1 Storage. OnePlus 9 Pro mein hai 6.7" ka QHD+ 120Hz LTPO AMOLED Display adaptive refresh rate ke saath. OnePlus 9 Pro mein ek Quad rear Camera setup hai jaha hai 48MP Primary + 50MP Ultrawide/Macro + 8MP Telephoto Camera jaha hai 3.3x Optical zoom aur 30x digital zoom aur saath hai ek 2MP Mono Camera. OnePlus 9 Pro mein 16MP ka Selfie camera hai aur saath mein 4500mAh ki battery hai Warp Charge 65 65W charging ke saath mein jaha 65W Warp Wireless 50 Charger aur 3W reverse wireless charging. OnePlus 9 Pro mein IP68 protection bhi available hai. Main aapke liye jaldi hi OnePlus 9 Series ka ek surprise leke aane waala hu. Mujhe umeed hai ki aapko OnePlus 9 Pro ki yeh Unboxing aur First Look video pasand aayegi.
 
OnePlus 9 Pro Price in India:
8GB/128GB: 64,999 INR 
12GB/256GB: 69,999 INR

snippet.title: OnePlus 9 Pro Durability Test! - Who is Hasselblad?!
snippet.description:
Its time to durability test the new OnePlus 9 Pro. With their giant Hassleblad camera. Grab your Robot Camo from channel sponsor dbrand HERE: https://www.dbrand.com/robot-camo The OnePlus 9 Pro is a mainstream android device nowadays. snippet.title: Teekhe Nain (Official Song) Jassa Dhillon | Baani Sandhu | Gur Sidhu | New Haryanvi Songs 2021
snippet.description:
Brown Town Music Presents New Haryanvi Song of 2021 Teekhe Nain By Jassa Dhillon Ft Baani Sandhu From His Debut Album Above All.


Track Credits:
Track Name:  Teekhe Nain
Artist : Jassa Dhillon Ft Baani Sandhu
Music : Gur Sidhu
Mixing & Mastering: B Saanj 
Lyrics: Jassa Dhillon
Instagram Reels: Boss Music Productions
Lyrical Video: The Creative Grooves
Producer: Nav Sandhu
Label: Brown Town Music
Team Believe: Shilpa Sharda & Srikant Seshadri



Online Promotions: BTown Media Entertainment
Instagram: https://instagram.com/btownmediaa​​​

Do Share your feedback in comments.
Don't Forget to Subscribe Brown Town Music : http://bit.ly/subscribebrowntownmusic​​


Teekhe Nain Lyrics:


Tikhe nain kataara aali ,
Kache dood na chori paali , 
ghote barga nasha sa chargya ,
dil pa la ka rakho taali,

Tikke nain kataara aali, 
kache dood na chori paali chori paali,
 
Har gaam ma rukka pargya, 
chora ek baat pa argya ,
 tanne jaan jaan jo bola ,
Aade gurgaun te bhirgya , 
tere khatar latth  bjaaye , 
na tu hi  kare na bye ,
Lachak machk teri sandel kaali , 
shaam kahe toh leju baali ,
 gani kasooti bangar vaali , 
Tikhe nain katara aali , 
kaache dhood na chori paali
 
 Tere yaar ki puri chacha ha , 
arre 100000 toh din ka kharcha ha ,
teri beuty uper la dyu ga , 
ye bade zigar ka larka ha ,
 kaache na karta kaam , 
kra dyu kahe toh chakka jaam ,
Jo b aa shareaam , 
yo chora  bilkul na badnaam
 Bade bhai ki choti saali , 
lambi gardan nazuk daali , 
dil pa la ka rakho taali ,
nain katara aali ,
kaache dhood na chori paali , 
tikkhe nain ktara aali ,
 
 
Ik baat maane batlaade ,
tere kitne lafde  chala ha ,
 manne bera lagya ,
naam tere pa datte hoye b halla ha,
arre Lafdya ki toh  baat shod,
yo new e challe jayege ,
Par tere piche piche toh ham,
 aakhri dam tak aayege ,
 Piche piche kyana ghume , 
baat toh kar jo karni ha , 
choti moti baat nahi,
 yo ka pyaar ki lambi journey ha
 Pehli baar na hue diwaane 
 maane ga bhar k harjaane ,
jeb ha khooli  loot khjaane
 siddi tu koi baat na maane  
Pyaar karuga bahrka  thali ,
kanna ma diomand ki baali , 
jaata ki toh roj diwaali,
 
 
Tikkhe nain ktara aali , kache dhood na chori paali ,
 
 
Itna Dabka challe ha , 
tere pure g se hojege , 
tanne Taj mahal b le dya ge,
jab pise e pise hojege ,
 
 
Shehr k gunde yaar k paali ,
arre kurti b tane tang sewali , 
arre barsega bass pittal khalli.

Tikhe nain kataara aali ,
Kache dood na chori paali , 
ghote barga nasha sa chargya ,
dil pa la ka rakho taali,

Tikke nain kataara aali, 
kache dood na chori paali chori paali,
 
Har gaam ma rukka pargya, 
chora ek baat pa argya ,
 tanne jaan jaan jo bola ,
Aade gurgaun te bhirgya , 
tere khatar latth  bjaaye , 
na tu hi  kare na bye ,
Lachak machk teri sandel kaali , 
shaam kahe toh leju baali ,
 gani kasooti bangar vaali , 
Tikhe nain katara aali , 
kaache dhood na chori paali
 
 Tere yaar ki puri chacha ha , 
arre 100000 toh din ka kharcha ha ,
teri beuty uper la dyu ga , 
ye bade zigar ka larka ha ,
 kaache na karta kaam , 
kra dyu kahe toh chakka jaam ,
Jo b aa shareaam , 
yo chora  bilkul na badnaam
 Bade bhai ki choti saali , 
lambi gardan nazuk daali , 
dil pa la ka rakho taali ,
nain katara aali ,
kaache dhood na chori paali , 
tikkhe nain ktara aali ,
 
 
Ik baat maane batlaade ,
tere kitne lafde  chala ha ,
 manne bera lagya ,
naam tere pa datte hoye b halla ha,
arre Lafdya ki toh  baat shod,
yo new e challe jayege ,
Par tere piche piche toh ham,
 aakhri dam tak aayege ,
 Piche piche kyana ghume , 
baat toh kar jo karni ha , 
choti moti baat nahi,
 yo ka pyaar ki lambi journey ha
 Pehli baar na hue diwaane 
 maane ga bhar k harjaane ,
jeb ha khooli  loot khjaane
 siddi tu koi baat na maane  
Pyaar karuga bahrka  thali ,
kanna ma diomand ki baali , 
jaata ki toh roj diwaali,
 
 
Tikkhe nain ktara aali , kache dhood na chori paali ,
 
 
Itna Dabka challe ha , 
tere pure g se hojege , 
tanne Taj mahal b le dya ge,
jab pise e pise hojege ,
 
 
Shehr k gunde yaar k paali ,
arre kurti b tane tang sewali , 
arre barsega bass pittal khalli.

snippet.title: Bicycle Bhais | Web Series | Episode 2 | Engine Out Completely | Popcorn Stories
snippet.description:
Bicycle Bhais | Malayalam Comedy Web Series | Episode 2 | Popcorn Stories 
 
Plot

The story revolves completely around the backdrop of a beautiful village and its innocent people. There is a two-wheeler workshop, owned by Suresh. His staff Podiyan known as Podimon , Kichu who introduces himself as the bike tester of the shop, but a lazy bum, in reality, Pappan the village drunkard who believes the workshop as his gin joint is the main characters and the story revolves around their friendship, joy, petty quarrels, arguments, blunders, and happiness along with other villagers. The entire plot and the characters will be enframed in Basheerian style, the village library, teashops, Toddyshop,  milk society, etc. Bindu is the wife of Suresh. She is a normal housewife. The couple doesn't have children, but they are adjusted to the fact and live happily. Bindu is a part of Suresh and his friend's group and their happiness Bicycle Bhais generally aims to present a village story with all its innocence in its visuals, characters, situations, and storyline.

en-IN.title: Bicycle Bhais | Web Series | Episode 2 | Engine Out Completely | Popcorn Stories
en-IN.description:
Bicycle Bhais | Malayalam Comedy Web Series | Episode 2 | Popcorn Stories 
 
Plot

The story revolves completely around the backdrop of a beautiful village and its innocent people. There is a two-wheeler workshop, owned by Suresh. His staff Podiyan known as Podimon , Kichu who introduces himself as the bike tester of the shop, but a lazy bum, in reality, Pappan the village drunkard who believes the workshop as his gin joint is the main characters and the story revolves around their friendship, joy, petty quarrels, arguments, blunders, and happiness along with other villagers. The entire plot and the characters will be enframed in Basheerian style, the village library, teashops, Toddyshop,  milk society, etc. Bindu is the wife of Suresh. She is a normal housewife. The couple doesn't have children, but they are adjusted to the fact and live happily. Bindu is a part of Suresh and his friend's group and their happiness Bicycle Bhais generally aims to present a village story with all its innocence in its visuals, characters, situations, and storyline.

snippet.description:
A Soulful melody of two hearts filled with love and emotions. #Baarishkijaaye where love will have a New meaning. Releasing on 27th March. The only way love can last a lifetime is if it's unconditional . The Bollywood King Nawazuddin Siddiqui and pollywood queen Sunandha Sharma is all set to take you all to there Dream world . The song is Sung by one of the finnest vocalist B Praak and penned down by Star Maker Jaani . The song is based on true story .

Lyrics -
Karda rahen ignore ve mainu
Labhgyi lagda hor ve tenu
Je tu pyar naal rakhna hi nahi 
Fer tu vapis tor ve mainu
Ik paasa karde yaar.. Asi tere nahi rehna
Marjaaneya tu hun nahi karda pyar..Asi tere nahi rehna

Tethon ramdev ton ve routine nahi chadya janda
Tu reliance chalauna hain..Tethon time nai kadhya janda
Tethon ramdev ton ve routine nahi chadya janda
Tu reliance chalauna hain..Tethon time nai kadhya janda

Kade bahr laja
Koi film dikha
Kade pyar naal
Koi gal sunaa
Banya rehnaa talwar asi tere nai rehna
Marjaneya
Tu hun nahi karda pyar asi tere nai rehna

Koi labh lyi hou chudail 
Chakkar koi paaya lagda
Sade pichon ve muuh
Kaala karvaaya lagda
Koi labh lyi hou chudail 
Chakkar koi paaya lagda
Sade pichon ve muuh
Kaala karvaaya lagda

Sanu milna nahi 
Milauna nahi
Babbu je pyar
Jatauna nahi
Ki pauna fer achaar Asi tere nahi rehna
Marhanevala
Tu hun nahi karda pyar asi tere nai rehna

Brahmaji vs Vennela Kishore | Who is the Main Comedian ? | #RangDeOn26thMarch

Rang De features Nithiin & Keerthy Suresh in lead roles. Directed by Venky Atluri & Produced by Suryadevara Naga Vamsi under Sithara Entertainments.

snippet.title: Chacha Vidhayak Hain Humare season 2 Teaser Auqaat aur Sapne - Zakir khan
snippet.description:
Chacha Vidhayak Hain Humare 

In Season 2 the stakes rise considerably for well-meaning and fun-loving neighborhood hero Ronny Bhaiya, as he navigates the world of politics and fights to keep his place in Humari Party as Chachaji's favorite youth leader. With him at all times are his beloved family and two best friends...and the promise of romance... Packed with even more laughter and bigger obstacles...here is a sneak peak at Season 2. 

Starring Zakir Khan, Kumar Varun, Vyom Sharma, Abhimanyu Singh, Sunny Hinduja, Zakir Hussain, Alka Amin, Venus, Onima Kashyap

Written by Ayush Tiwari, Utkarsh Porwal and Zakir khan

Directed by Shashant Shah

Executive Producer Aliya Curmally 

Produced by Zakir Khan, Rasika Tyagi, Ajay Nair
On OML Entertainment Production

snippet.title: മീനാക്ഷിയുടെ പിറന്നാളിന് മഞ്ജുവിന്റെ കണ്ണുനിറയുന്ന സമ്മാനം l Meenakshi l Manju Warrier l Birthday
snippet.description:
താരങ്ങളെക്കാള്‍ ശ്രദ്ധിക്കപ്പെടുന്നവരാണ് താരങ്ങളുടെ മക്കള്‍. മലയാളസിനിമലോകത്ത് ഏറെ ചര്‍ച്ചയായ താരപുത്രിയാണ് ദീലീപിന്റെയും മഞ്ജു വാര്യരുടെയും മകള്‍ മീനാക്ഷിയുടേത്. സോഷ്യല്‍ മീഡിയയില്‍ സജീവമല്ലാത്ത മീനാക്ഷിയുടെ അധികം ചിത്രങ്ങളും ആരാധകര്‍ കണ്ടിട്ടില്ല. ദീലിപിന്റെയും മഞ്ജുവിന്റെയും മകള്‍ സിനിമയിലേക്ക് വരും എന്ന ആരാധകരുടെ വിലയിരുത്തലുകളെ തെറ്റിച്ച് ഡോക്ടറാകാനുളള ആഗ്രഹമാണ്  മീനാക്ഷി വെളിപ്പെടുത്തിയത്. തുടര്‍ന്ന് നീറ്റ് പരീക്ഷ എഴുതിയ മീനാക്ഷി ഇപ്പോള്‍ ചെന്നൈയില്‍ എംബിബിഎസ്സിനു പഠിക്കുകയാണ്. ഇന്ന് താരപുത്രിയുടെ പിറന്നാളാണ്. 2000-ത്തിലാണ് ദിലീപിന്റെയും മഞ്ജുവാര്യരുടെയും മകളായി മീനാക്ഷി ജനിക്കുന്നത്. ഇന്ന് മീനാക്ഷിക്ക് 21 വയസ്സ് തികഞ്ഞിരിക്കുന്നു. മീനാക്ഷിയെ കുട്ടികാലത്ത് ദിലീപ് എടുത്തുനില്‍ക്കുന്ന ചിത്രം അടുത്തിടെയും വൈറല്‍ ആയിരുന്നു.

#Meenakshi  #Birthday #ManjuWarrier #Dileep #KavyaMadhavan #mahalakshmi

ml.description:
താരങ്ങളെക്കാള്‍ ശ്രദ്ധിക്കപ്പെടുന്നവരാണ് താരങ്ങളുടെ മക്കള്‍. മലയാളസിനിമലോകത്ത് ഏറെ ചര്‍ച്ചയായ താരപുത്രിയാണ് ദീലീപിന്റെയും മഞ്ജു വാര്യരുടെയും മകള്‍ മീനാക്ഷിയുടേത്. സോഷ്യല്‍ മീഡിയയില്‍ സജീവമല്ലാത്ത മീനാക്ഷിയുടെ അധികം ചിത്രങ്ങളും ആരാധകര്‍ കണ്ടിട്ടില്ല. ദീലിപിന്റെയും മഞ്ജുവിന്റെയും മകള്‍ സിനിമയിലേക്ക് വരും എന്ന ആരാധകരുടെ വിലയിരുത്തലുകളെ തെറ്റിച്ച് ഡോക്ടറാകാനുളള ആഗ്രഹമാണ്  മീനാക്ഷി വെളിപ്പെടുത്തിയത്. തുടര്‍ന്ന് നീറ്റ് പരീക്ഷ എഴുതിയ മീനാക്ഷി ഇപ്പോള്‍ ചെന്നൈയില്‍ എംബിബിഎസ്സിനു പഠിക്കുകയാണ്. ഇന്ന് താരപുത്രിയുടെ പിറന്നാളാണ്. 2000-ത്തിലാണ് ദിലീപിന്റെയും മഞ്ജുവാര്യരുടെയും മകളായി മീനാക്ഷി ജനിക്കുന്നത്. ഇന്ന് മീനാക്ഷിക്ക് 21 വയസ്സ് തികഞ്ഞിരിക്കുന്നു. മീനാക്ഷിയെ കുട്ടികാലത്ത് ദിലീപ് എടുത്തുനില്‍ക്കുന്ന ചിത്രം അടുത്തിടെയും വൈറല്‍ ആയിരുന്നു.

#Meenakshi  #Birthday #ManjuWarrier #Dileep #KavyaMadhavan #mahalakshmi

snippet.title: कौन कर रहा है Tapu Sena के Match को Ball से Disturb? | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा | Tapu Sena Special
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to LIV Comedy: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCBIT1FSJW6yTlzqK-31FDWg?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the comedy clips of your favorite show:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLSXTaG1fT0cSiLT_KtMpfLkX7ug1LXUBt

Tapu Sena is yet again busy with cricket match but somebody is disturbing their game and is throwing the ball from the bushes. What will Tapu Sena do?

About The Show:
----------------------------
Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah is a comedy show inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chashmah' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This show revolves around Gada Family which consists of uneducated Businessman Jethalal Champaklal Gada, Jethalal’s Wife Daya & their naughty Son Tipendra Gada living in 'Gokuldham Co-operative Society' and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. In case of a problem and emergency, Jethalal Gada often rushes to Taarak Mehta to seek his help and guidance as he finds a philosopher in him. The residents of the housing society, help each other find solutions when they face common, real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

#tmkoc #taarakmehta

snippet.title: Yuvarathnaa Trailer - Kannada | Puneeth Rajkumar | Santhosh Ananddram | Thaman S | Hombale Films
snippet.description:
Watch the Power Packed Trailer of Yuvarathnaa , An upcoming Kannada and Telugu film from the hit trio Puneeth Rajkumar, Santhosh Ananddram & Hombale Films.

A government aided college, RK University, is on the verge of completing its golden jubilee but a bizarre event shuts it down indefinitely. Will RK University restore its lost glory?

Movie Details:
Movie Name: Yuvarathnaa
Produced by: Vijay Kiragandur 
Production House : Hombale Films
Story, Written & Directed by : Santhosh Ananddram
Cast : Puneeth Rajkumar, Sayyeshaa Saigal, Dhananjaya, Prakash Raj, Diganth, Sonu Gowda, Tharak Ponnappa, Vishal Hegde, Avinash, Prakash Belawadi, Sai Kumar, Sudharani and others.
Music: S. Thaman
Cinematography: Venkatesh Anguraj
Editor: Jnaanesh B Matad
Stunt : Ram-Lakshman, Anbu-Arivu, Vijay Master, Dhilip Subbarayan
Choreography : Jaani Master, Sirish Master, Chinni Prakash.
Executive Producer : Karthik Gowda
Costumes & Styling : Yogi G Raj
VFX & DI : Igene, Chennai
Poster Design : Kaani Studios, Dhani Aelay
OOH Media : Avinashi Ads, Khushi Ads.
Art : Shivakumar
Effects : Rajen
Digital and Marketing Partner (Telugu) : Silly Monks

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - तारक मेहता का उल्टा चशमाह - Episode 755 - Full Episode
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to SAB TV Channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/sabtv?sub_confirmation=1

Click to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7Zfu1x9Bd1UqLwUxhZ1oBJh

The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.description:

#ColorsTV #BarristerBabu

In a bid to save an 8-year-old girl from becoming the victim of Sati, Anirudh marries a curious and tyrant girl Bondita. At a time when women education was considered sinful, Anirudh educates Bondita and makes her the first “Barrister Babu” of their region. Will their imperfect marriage turn into a successful relationship? Will Anirudh succeed in his mission to gain independence for the women in his country?

snippet.title: തലകറക്കം വന്നാൽ ഉടനെ ഇങ്ങനെ ചെയ്താൽ മതി | Vertigo Home Remedies in Malayalam | Arogyam
snippet.description:
തലകറക്കം എളുപ്പം മാറാൻ ചെയ്യേണ്ട കാര്യങ്ങൾ  - What is vertigo, Causes, Symptoms and Treatment in Malayalam.

ചെവിയുടെ അസുഖം കാരണം വരുന്ന തലകറക്കം മാറാൻ ചെയ്യേണ്ട കാര്യങ്ങൾ. Positional Vertigo Exercises - Dr. Aju Ravindran (Senior Consultant - ENT, Starcare Hospital, Kozhikode) സംസാരിക്കുന്നു..

കൂടുതൽ അറിയാൻ വിളിക്കൂ  : 0495 2489 000, 949 5728 201

Exercises for Vertigo: 4 Options to Try for Relief:
Start in an upright, seated position.
Move into the lying position on one side with your nose pointed up at about a 45-degree angle.
Remain in this position for about 30 seconds (or until the vertigo subsides, whichever is longer). Then move back to the seated position.
Repeat on the other side.

Feel free to comment here for any doubts regarding this video.

snippet.title: Monday सुबह 6 बजे तक इन 3 शहरों में Lockdown | मास्क नहीं लगाने से सख्त कदम उठाने पड़ सकते है- CM
snippet.description:
IBC24, Monday सुबह 6 बजे तक इन 3 शहरों में Lockdown, मास्क नहीं लगाने से सख्त कदम उठाने पड़ सकते है,- CM Shivraj
 
#MadhyaPradeshNews #ChhattisgarhNews

Follow us: 

instagram : https://www.instagram.com/ibc24.in/

YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCBc13XYipnBIBE3Ff8QaaGg

Telegram :  https://t.me/cg_mp_news

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/IBC24 

Twitter: https://twitter.com/ibc24news?lang=en 

Google+: https://plus.google.com/+IBC24InNews 

IBC24 Website: http://www.ibc24.in/

IBC24 is a media and news organization. Its Head office is in Raipur, the state capital of Chhattisgarh. This channel is providing primarily regional news of Madhya Pradesh & Chhattisgarh besides national, International, sports and other main news of public interests. Our wide network of reporters in rural and urban areas has made us one of the most reliable news channels of Madhya Pradesh and Chhattisgarh. 

We have a history of providing reliable news in matters pertaining to local, national and international significance. Many times our onscreen coverage has been picked up by various national and international news channels. Especially our coverage during Dantewada Naxal attack on CRPF jawans and during the Naxal attack on the motorcade of Congress leaders and the massacre that followed at Jhiram Ghati (also known as Darbha Ghati Massacre).

Video Link:https://youtu.be/47h5_Whhe2w

Incoming Search Terms:
Chhattisgarh News, Madhya Pradesh News,

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 1200 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
Angel executes her devious ploy and mercilessly shoots Virat in front of Heer. Catch this sneak peek of the upcoming episode to know more.
#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

mr.title: इनसाइड हॅरी आणि मेघन्स हाउस | फीट. शुभंकर तावडे आणि मृण्मयी गोडबोले | #bhadipa
mr.description:
मेघन आणि हॅरी करत आहेत नव्या आयुष्याला सुरूवात. चला बघुया काय होतं त्यांच्या घरगुती जीवनात. एकत्र करू शकतील का ते घरकाम की भोगावे लागतील त्यांना घर सोडण्याचे परिणाम? जाणून घेण्यासाठी व्हिडिओ शेवटपर्यंत पाहा. अशा आणखी विनोदी व्हिडीओज् साठी भाडिपाला सबस्क्राईब करा. 

श्रेयावली

कलाकार
मृण्मयी गोडबोले
शुभंकर तावडे
पॉला मॅग्लेन

दिग्दर्शन - सागरिका जोशी
लेखन - कल्पक भावे
सहाय्यक दिग्दर्शक - वैष्णवी सानप
क्रिएटिव्ह प्रोड्युसर - पॉला मॅग्लेन
छायांकन - चैतन्य रक्षक
ध्वनी - मलय वडाळकर
रंगभूषा - अश्विन राणे
केस - श्वेता जाधव
प्रोडक्शन मॅनेजर - प्राजक्ता सालबर्डे
ऑन-सेट प्रोडक्शन सहाय्यक - सिद्धाय जोशी
हेड स्पॉट - मंगेश दादा
केटरिंग - राज केटरिंग
लाईटस् - फामोस सिने इक्विपमेंट्स

snippet.description:
ഡിജിറ്റൽ സൈൻചെയ്ത ക്യുആർ കോഡ്, ഹോളോഗ്രാം തുടങ്ങിയവ കാർഡിലുണ്ടാകും. ആധാർ ഉടമകൾക്ക് ലളിതമായ നടപടിക്രമങ്ങളിലൂടെ ഓൺലൈനായി കാർഡിന് അപേക്ഷിക്കാം. തപാൽ ചാർജ്, ജിഎസ്ടി എന്നിവ ഉൾപ്പടെ 50 രൂപയാണ് ഫീസ്. സ്പീഡ് പോസ്റ്റിൽ കാർഡ് ഉടമയുടെ കൈവശമെത്തും.

ചെയ്യേണ്ടത്

ഇതിനായി ഔദ്യോഗിക വെബ്സൈറ്റിൽ കയറുക. https://residentpvc.uidai.gov.in/order-pvcreprint

ആധാർ നമ്പർ നൽകുക. മൊബൈലിൽ ലഭിക്കുന്ന ഒ.ടി.പി നമ്പർ സൈറ്റിൽ നിർദിഷ്ട സ്ഥലത്ത് ചേർക്കുക.

കാർഡുടമയുടെ അടിസ്ഥാന വിവരങ്ങൾ അടങ്ങിയ പുതിയ പേജ് തുറന്നുവരും. കാർഡിലെ വിവരങ്ങൾ ഉറപ്പുവരുത്താം.

അതുകഴിഞ്ഞാൽ 50 രൂപ പണമടയ്ക്കണം. യു.പി.ഐ, ക്രഡിറ് കാർഡ്, ഡെബിറ്റ് കാർഡ് തുടങ്ങിയവ ഉപയോഗിച്ച് അതിനുള്ള സൗകര്യമുണ്ട്.

പണമടച്ചുകഴിഞ്ഞാൽ ഭാവിയിൽ സ്റ്റാറ്റസ് പരിശോധിക്കാൻ ഒരു നമ്പർ ലഭിക്കും.

പിന്നീട് തപാലിൽ കാർഡ് ലഭിക്കും.

................

ആദായ നികുതി വകുപ്പിന്റെ incometaxindia.gov.in എന്ന വെബ്സൈറ്റു വഴി പാൻ-ആധാർ കാർഡ് ബന്ധിപ്പിക്കാം.

How to link PAN-Aadhaar card: പാൻ-ആധാർ കാർഡ് ബന്ധിപ്പിക്കുന്നതെങ്ങനെ?

Step 1: ആധാറും പാൻ കാർഡും ബന്ധിപ്പിക്കുന്നതിന് പ്രത്യേക വെബ് പേജ് ആദായ നികുതി വകുപ്പ് ആരംഭിച്ചിട്ടുണ്ട്. ഇതിനായി ആദായ നികുതി വകുപ്പിന്റെ “Link Adhar” എന്ന ഭാഗത്ത് ക്ലിക്ക് ചെയ്യണം. incometaxindiaefiling.gov.in എന്ന വെബ്പേജ് തുറന്നുവരും. അല്ലെങ്കിൽ ആദായ നികുതി വകുപ്പിന്റെ e-filing portal സന്ദർശിക്കുക. PAN-Aadhaar linking എന്ന ഓപ്ഷനിൽ ക്ലിക്ക് ചെയ്യുക

Step 2: പാൻ, ആധാർ നമ്പരുകൾ നൽകുക

Step 3: ആധാർ കാർഡിലെ നിങ്ങളുടെ പേര് നൽകുക

Step 4: നിങ്ങളുടെ ആധാർ കാർഡിൽ ജനന തീയതി മാത്രമാണുളളതെങ്കിൽ ‘I have the only year of birth in Aadhar card’ എന്നത് മാർക്ക് ചെയ്യുക

Step 5: അതിനുശേഷം ‘I agree to validate my Aadhar details with UIDAI’ എന്നത് മാർക്ക് ചെയ്യുക

Step 6: സ്ക്രീനിൽ കാണുന്ന captcha code ടൈപ്പ് ചെയ്യുക

Step 7: ‘Link Aadhaar’ ഓപ്ഷനിൽ ക്ലിക്ക് ചെയ്യുക

ഇത്രയും കഴിയുമ്പോൾ ആധാർ-പാൻ ലിങ്കിങ് വിജയകരമായി പൂർത്തിയാക്കിയതായി സ്ക്രീനിൽ തെളിയും.

ആദായനികുതി വകുപ്പിന്റെ വെബ്‌സൈറ്റിൽ പാൻ-ആധാറുമായി ലിങ്ക് ചെയ്തോയെന്നും പരിശോധിക്കാം. ഇതിനായി ആദായ നികുതി വകുപ്പിന്റെ e-filing portal (incometaxindiaefiling.gov.in) സന്ദർശിക്കുക. PAN-Aadhaar linking എന്ന ഓപ്ഷനിൽ ക്ലിക്ക് ചെയ്യുക. പുതിയൊരു പേജ് തുറക്കും. അതിലെ Click here എന്ന ഓപ്ഷനിൽ ക്ലിക്ക് ചെയ്യുക.

snippet.title: 99 Songs | Official Trailer (Tamil) | AR Rahman | Ehan Bhatt | Edilsy | Lisa Ray | Manisha Koirala
snippet.description:
Presenting the trailer of 99 Songs in Tamil.

Directed by Vishwesh Krishnamoorthy, 99 Songs marks the debut of Oscar-winning
composer A R Rahman as a writer and producer, and introduces Ehan Bhat and Edilsy
Vargas. The movie follows the journey of a young man named Jay whose life centers
around his two great loves: music and his girlfriend Sophie.

Introducing: Ehan Bhat, Edilsy Vargas
Starring: Manisha Koirala, Lisa Ray, Tenzin Dalha, Warina Hussain, Ranjit Barot, Neel Tyagi, Rahul Ram, Diwakar Pundir
Casting Director: Mukesh Chabra C.S.A
Makeup & Hair Design: Vikram Gaikwad
Digital Intermediate: After Studio
Colorist: Nicola Gasparri
Costume Designer: Eka Lakhani
Dialogues: Hussain Dalal
Tamil Dialogues - Gautham Vasudev Menon
Singer: Shreya Ghoshal, Sid Sriram, Vijay Yesudas, Benny Dayal, Sreekanth Hariharan, Shashaa Tirupati, Nikita Gandhi, Poorvi Koutish, Sarthak Kalyani, Abhay Jodhpurkar, Haricharan, Swagath Rathod, Thoughtforyou, Jonita Gandhi, Sharanya Srinivas, Sreeesha, Bela Shende
Lyricist: Vivek, Madhan Karky, Thamarai, Kabilan, PA Vijay, Kutti Revathi, Thamarai, Mashook Rahman, Poorvi Koutish
Sound Designer: Krishnan Subramanian
Audiography: Alok Dey
Visual Effects: Labyrinth Cinematic Solutions. Red Chillies VFX
Marketing Agency: House of Awe
Digital Agency: Everymedia
Editors: Akshay Mehta, Shreyas Beltangdy
Consulting Editor: Monisha R Baldawa
Cinematography: Tanay Satam, James Cowley
Production Designer: Aparna Raina
Co-Producers: Ramanam Muthulingam, Saji Nada
Executive Producers: Karan Grover, Sharada Trilok

#ARRahman​ #99songs​ #JioStudios​ #EhanBhat

snippet.title: एकबार बनायेगें तो महिनों भर खायेंगे नमकीन ऐसी की मार्केट की नमकीन खाना तो भूल ही जायेंगेSuji Namkeen
snippet.description:
एकबार बनायेगें तो महिनों भर खायेंगे नमकीन ऐसी की मार्केट की नमकीन खाना तो भूल ही जायेंगेSuji Namkeen

#SoojiKiNamkeen#SnacksRecipe#HoliSpecial

Ingredients :-

Semolina-1 cup
Boiled Potatoes-4
Peanut-1 cup
Almonds-1/4 cup
Cashew Nuts-1/4 cup
Raisins-1/4 cup
Curry Leaves-15-20
Red Chilli Powder-1-1/2 tsp
Chat Masala-1 tsp
Powder Sugar-2 tsp
Black Pepper Powder-1/2 tsp
Black Salt-1/2 tsp
Salt-to taste
Oil For Frying

snippet.title: കൂടെ ഉണ്ടായിരുന്ന നാളുകളിൽ അവൾ എനിക്ക് നിഴൽ ആയിരുന്നു. അവളുടെ നിഴൽ എനിക്ക് കൂട്ടും| Tribute to Rossy
snippet.description: This is a tribute video to our beloved Rossy who had passed away due to an incurable renal failure. Right from the moment I met her she stole my heart and now her loss has left a huge hole in my life. Though the pain is unbearable, life will have to move on and I made this video as a tribute to our Rossy as I know that all of you had also loved and enjoyed her company through my vlogs. We will always love you Rossy and you will always remain an irreplaceable part of my life. Rest in peace my beloved baby and thank you for all the beautiful memories.

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - तारक मेहता का उल्टा चशमाह - Episode 754 - Full Episode
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to SAB TV Channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/sabtv?sub_confirmation=1

Click to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7Zfu1x9Bd1UqLwUxhZ1oBJh

The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: Online Class Mein Disturbance! | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा Ep 3127
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku

The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

snippet.title: Meeting My Ex After Marriage || Shadi Ke Baad || Nazarbattu
snippet.description:
Even the most joyful night of your suhagrat can turn into a disaster if your wife receives a call from her ex while being in bed with you. But if life is still not happy it will shock you even more by sending your Ex to your house as the new girlfriend of your brother in law. This episode is full up of drama twists and turns one has never seen before.  Watch the episode and enjoy the laughter ride.

snippet.title: Ananda Bhavan Episode 52, 23/03/2021 | #VikatanPrimeTime
snippet.description:
Vallamai Tharayo - https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLKcGe9BTHkrqU79qB4wJs4mOXjM3AzdBg
Ananda Bhavan was a popular serial produced by Vikatan Televistas and aired on Sun TV. Ananda Bhavan portrays the story of a family which runs the hotel named “Ananda Bhavan”. The story revolves around the sufferings and the trials of the family in running the hotel. After Akshaya, #VikatanPrimeTime brings Ananda Bhavan to you!

The old-fashioned story theme of mother-in-law versus daughter-in-law, malice exchanges between the father and the eldest son-in-law, sisters-in-law who refuse to go to their in-laws place even after marriage. The character of the brother who is loving and caring towards his parents and wife are some of the back stories which form the crux of the story for this TV serial. Ananda Bhavan was aired at 9 PM on all weekdays on Sun TV. The cast of Anand Bhavan included Chetan, Delhi Kumar, Satchu, Vanaja, Anand and many more.

20 years back, in the first week of November 1998, Vikatan Televistas started their journey with a weekly serial Akshaya on SUN TV, every Thursday at 9 pm. It has been 20 years of entertaining you - our audience. We thank you for your support, love and criticism all these years. #20YearsOfVikatanTelevistas
Kolangal revolves around the lives of four siblings; the eldest daughter is the main protagonist. It relates the story of these children whose mother taught them to always be straightforward in life.
Subscribe: https://goo.gl/QiBz7h Vikatan App - http://bit.ly/2QvUBTD

snippet.title: Keede - Dino James [Official Video]
snippet.description:
Marne na paye keede sulemani ke.... Keede bohot jaruri hai

Produced by: Jimmy Enterprises
Artist: Dino James
Composed and Written by Dino James
Music: Bluish Music ( Nilesh Patel)
Mix & Master: Abhishek Ghatak
Recording Engineer: Mansi
Vocal Dubbing Studio : AMV Studios
Producer: Jimmy Enterprises
Directed and Edited by Himanshu Tyagi
DOP: Mikhaeil Shah
Executive Producer: Prashant Sharma
Colorist: Harsh
 
Dance Team: V company
Location: V company studios
Choreographer: Vernon Monteiro
Assistant Choreographer: Axi
Featured Dancers: Rajendra, Jayesh, Rahul, Shivam, Santosh, Mosin, Anil, Jainam, Nikhil, Amit, Vaibhav, Tushar, Himanshu, Siddhesh, Rohit
 
Lyrics:
 
“कीड़े”
 VERSE 1:
baahar se kaafi mai mai seedha sa ladka tha, ander se thoda sa sanki
jab baki ke bollywood gane baja rahe the,mujhe toh rappers pasand the
daddy ne bola tum business sambhalo ,par mujhe pasand nahi the dhande
andar he andar kuch hone laga, kuch kide karne lage pange….
 
kido ne raato ko jagaya
kido ne body bhi banaya
kido ne bola ki mamuli nahi hai tu
dino ko dino se milaya
 
Dheele logo se toh mujhe hai allergy
Dheele se rapping hai dheele hai melody
chodo yeh pange aur chodo yeh jealousy
Diss na karna yeh lage hai parody
 
Kabhi mai pagal hu kabhi mai Mehnati
mujhe na roko mai karunga Tarraki
meri road khali hai, zara na gardi
gane bana nahi deta mai therapy
 
gano mai susti nahi , gano mai Sheelajeet
suno toh energy energy energy energy energy energy energy
 
hathi phasega nahi chuhedani mai
Reti toh pani mai ghulega nahi be
bhale yeh log tujhe yeda bulaye
par marne na paye kide sulemani ke
 
tez mai bhaag raha jo bhi mile,  mujhe kehte hai beta ji dheere
mai fast nahi tu slow…khud ko dekh le...tu mujhe kya bol raha dheele
mai toh kehta hu tum dharti par ho …. par hum toh bus taaro mai jee re
na... jeene de ,jeene de,jeene de,jeene de,jeene de,jeene de 
Keede

VERSE 2:
aunty ne bola ki beta lazy hai , pata nahi kya hoga career
kisi bhi cheezo mai josh nahi hai, pada rehti hai yeh mariyal
fir doctor ke paas wo leke gaye fir bola sir kuch toh kariyae
doctor ne bola ki dino ko suno tum, body mai kido ki kami hai

Ab aise ki taisi re desi pilao
Duniya ko todenge, JCB Lao
Kido ki suni mast bana pulaav
velee baithe, chalo lade chunao
 
bache jo singer the gane nahi gate hai
cricketer bachhe ab tuition ko jate
pucho ki kya hua toh roke batate hai
papaji chinese hai kido ko khate hai
 
papaji aisa na karo yaar
bacho ke kido ko maro nahi
kuch bada karega toh famous ho jaoge
famous ho jayegi caaloni
 
kya karu ander ki chool ka mai
rule aur usool ke school ka mai, yeeh
babool ki daal hai, phool kum hai
sun dhool se aaya hu full dum hai
 
aise luul se raparoo mai huul kum hai
ab Clueless hoke bus tu jhoolta reh
mujhe keede bole bus beta dhoodhta reh
sare tool hai paas -  dino  tootta nahi
 
Past bhool nahi, tabhi raja phoolta nahi
Meri bhool bhuliya mai ghum ghoomta reh
tu jaanta khoob hai Who’s the next
Bus swag mai bete mujhe ghoorta reh
Keede
 
#DinoJames #Keede #HipHop #Drill

Follow Dino James:
www.instagram.com/dinojms
www.facebook.com/dinojms
www.twitter.com/dinojimmyy

kya karu ander ki chool ka mai
rule aur usool ke school ka mai, yeeh
babool ki daal hai, phool kum hai
sun dhool se aaya hu full dum hai
 
aise luul se raparoo mai huul kum hai
ab Clueless hoke bus tu jhoolta reh
mujhe keede bole bus beta dhoodhta reh
sare tool hai paas -  dino  tootta nahi
 
Past bhool nahi, tabhi raja phoolta nahi
Meri bhool bhuliya mai ghum ghoomta reh
tu jaanta khoob hai Who’s the next
Bus swag mai bete mujhe ghoorta reh
Keede
 
#DinoJames #Keede #HipHop #Drill

hi.title: Keede - Dino James [Official Video]
hi.description:
Marne na paye keede sulemani ke.... Keede bohot jaruri hai

Produced by: Jimmy Enterprises
Artist: Dino James
Composed and Written by Dino James
Music: Bluish Music ( Nilesh Patel)
Mix & Master: Abhishek Ghatak
Recording Engineer: Mansi
Vocal Dubbing Studio : AMV Studios
Producer: Jimmy Enterprises
Directed and Edited by Himanshu Tyagi
DOP: Mikhaeil Shah
Executive Producer: Prashant Sharma
Colorist: Harsh
 
Dance Team: V company
Location: V company studios
Choreographer: Vernon Monteiro
Assistant Choreographer: Axi
Featured Dancers: Rajendra, Jayesh, Rahul, Shivam, Santosh, Mosin, Anil, Jainam, Nikhil, Amit, Vaibhav, Tushar, Himanshu, Siddhesh, Rohit
 
Lyrics:
 
“कीड़े”
 VERSE 1:
baahar se kaafi mai mai seedha sa ladka tha, ander se thoda sa sanki
jab baki ke bollywood gane baja rahe the,mujhe toh rappers pasand the
daddy ne bola tum business sambhalo ,par mujhe pasand nahi the dhande
andar he andar kuch hone laga, kuch kide karne lage pange….
 
kido ne raato ko jagaya
kido ne body bhi banaya
kido ne bola ki mamuli nahi hai tu
dino ko dino se milaya
 
Dheele logo se toh mujhe hai allergy
Dheele se rapping hai dheele hai melody
chodo yeh pange aur chodo yeh jealousy
Diss na karna yeh lage hai parody
 
Kabhi mai pagal hu kabhi mai Mehnati
mujhe na roko mai karunga Tarraki
meri road khali hai, zara na gardi
gane bana nahi deta mai therapy
 
gano mai susti nahi , gano mai Sheelajeet
suno toh energy energy energy energy energy energy energy
 
hathi phasega nahi chuhedani mai
Reti toh pani mai ghulega nahi be
bhale yeh log tujhe yeda bulaye
par marne na paye kide sulemani ke
 
tez mai bhaag raha jo bhi mile,  mujhe kehte hai beta ji dheere
mai fast nahi tu slow…khud ko dekh le...tu mujhe kya bol raha dheele
mai toh kehta hu tum dharti par ho …. par hum toh bus taaro mai jee re
na... jeene de ,jeene de,jeene de,jeene de,jeene de,jeene de 
Keede

VERSE 2:
aunty ne bola ki beta lazy hai , pata nahi kya hoga career
kisi bhi cheezo mai josh nahi hai, pada rehti hai yeh mariyal
fir doctor ke paas wo leke gaye fir bola sir kuch toh kariyae
doctor ne bola ki dino ko suno tum, body mai kido ki kami hai

Ab aise ki taisi re desi pilao
Duniya ko todenge, JCB Lao
Kido ki suni mast bana pulaav
velee baithe, chalo lade chunao
 
bache jo singer the gane nahi gate hai
cricketer bachhe ab tuition ko jate
pucho ki kya hua toh roke batate hai
papaji chinese hai kido ko khate hai
 
papaji aisa na karo yaar
bacho ke kido ko maro nahi
kuch bada karega toh famous ho jaoge
famous ho jayegi caaloni
 
kya karu ander ki chool ka mai
rule aur usool ke school ka mai, yeeh
babool ki daal hai, phool kum hai
sun dhool se aaya hu full dum hai
 
aise luul se raparoo mai huul kum hai

Meri bhool bhuliya mai ghum ghoomta reh
tu jaanta khoob hai Who’s the next

snippet.title: Hyderabad: Telangana government employees celebrate after CM announces 30% pay hike
snippet.description: Telangana state government employees celebrated on March 22 after CM K Chandrasekhar Rao announced 30% pay hike. All 9,17,797 employees and pensioners will get 30% fitment from next financial year. The state govt also increased retirement age of employees to 61 years.

snippet.title: OnePlus 9 Pro, ரொம்ப தரமான கேஸ் உடன் - புள் Review!
snippet.description:
இன்னைக்கி வீடியோல OnePlus 9 series-ல இருக்கிறதுலே பெஸ்ட் ஆன Oneplus 9 Pro தான் review பண்ணப்போறோம். இந்த Hasselblad partnership இங்க கேமரா-வை நிஜமா அடுத்த கட்டத்துக்கு கொண்டு போய் இருக்கா இதெல்லாம் தெரிஞ்சுக்க இந்த வீடியோ பாருங்க!

The OnePlus 9 Pro comes with a QHD+ 6.7 inch  AMOLED with a 120Hz refresh rate - OnePlus is claiming that its refresh rate can vary from 1Hz to 120Hz. The chipset here is flagship Qualcomm Snapdragon 888 with 5G capabilities. Powering it is a respectable 4500 mAh battery and as usual we get Warp Charge 65T when wired and Warp Charge 50T when charging wireless. Rounding it up we have a quad camera setup to the back with a 48MP primary, 50MP Ultrawide, 8MP Telephoto and 2MP Monochrome shooter.The selfie snapper up front is a 16MP sensor.

#OnePlus9 #OnePlus9Pro #C4ETech
If you liked my "OnePlus 9 Pro, ரொம்ப தரமான கேஸ் உடன் - புள் Review!” do give it a Thumbs Up & Share! Comments are welcome too :)

snippet.title: Harano Sur - Full Episode | 21 March 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Harano Sur" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Harano Sur: Shashanka Shekhar, the music maestro, is spellbound by Ahana’s singing and wants to get her married to his son Nakshatra. He is inclined towards popular music over classical & is more renowned than his father. He is against marrying a singer. Coincidentally, he also meets Ahana & she appears to be someone who doesn’t care about his celebrity status or lavish lifestyle. He gets married to Ahana, without knowing about her singing abilities. What will happen when Nakshatra gets to know about Ahana’s singing abilities? Will music cause divide between them?

SUBSCRIBE to Sun Bangla YouTube channel - http://bit.ly/2kviBbJ

snippet.title: TTL’s Ek College Reunion Aisa Bhi ft. Chandan Anand, Pooja Singh, Pratish Mehta
snippet.description:
When the woes of adulting take over and we are stuck doing our dead-end corporate jobs, college reunions provide the much-needed respite we wish for. Be it to catch up with old friends, to sort out past differences, to relive old memories or maybe just to do a little show off, college reunions are always a mix of fun and nostalgia! But not all reunions are like that. To know what things can possibly go wrong in a college reunion, watch out this sketch by The Timeliners titled Ek College Reunion Aisa Bhi.

Aur jab woh college ke yaaron-doston wali yaadein dobaara taaza karni ho toh uthaiye Mic aur jamaiye rang Saregama Carvaan Karaoke ke sangg.. isme aate hain 1000 preloaded Karaoke tracks aur 2 stylish mics bhi.. along with 5000 preloaded evergreen songs, 20000 additional songs and 280+ podcasts.

Click the link below for more details:  https://rb.gy/q300lk
